name: Turkey Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 2 Bell Peppers, preferably red and green, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F. Wrap tortillas in foil and place in the oven while making the fajita filling.
2. Mix chili powder and oregano on waxed paper. Rub the spice mixture into turkey cutlets.
3. In a large skillet, heat one teaspoon of oil. Add bell pepper strips and cook over medium-high heat for 4-6 minutes, stirring often, until lightly browned and tender-crisp. Remove to a bowl using a slotted spoon.
4. Heat remaining oil in the same skillet. Add cutlets and cook over medium-high heat for 4-6 minutes, turning once, until they are browned and no longer pink in the center when tested with a knife.
5. Cut turkey crosswise into narrow strips. Top each warm tortilla with a lettuce leaf and arrange turkey and bell pepper strips down the middle. Serve with salsa.
Per serving: 287 calories, 26g protein, 31g carbohydrates, 7g fat, 22% calories from fat, 53mg cholesterol, 338mg sodium.
